purpose: Product and dependency update backlog for Unica bundled tools, plugin package dependencies, and release-package inputs.

products.notes: v0.2.37 was applied with typed graph/diagnostics through unica.code.*; upstream v0.2.39..v0.2.43 now adds extension merge/weaving diagnostics and IDE formatting changes, so a follow-up contract review is required before moving the lock.

Updated together with rlm-bsl-index to v1.24.0. v1.23.0/v1.24.0 add read-only helper efficiency changes, get_object_profile, count_only, truncation metadata, and overrides_count; no raw RLM helper guidance is exposed through skills.

v1.24.0 release states index schema and BUILDER_VERSION remain 14, so production index rebuild is not required. Contract gates verify build/info/update, schema tables used by Unica SQL, and generated package launchers.
Updated tools.lock.json to v0.5.1 after reviewing the version command and partial-load/build changes; Unica MCP contract remains typed and unchanged.
Update web-test package-lock and verify Playwright import/version.
Source pin is current; local interpreter may still have 6.1.0 until test requirements are installed.
cargo update --dry-run reports compatible patch updates: cc 1.2.64 -> 1.2.65 and log 0.4.32 -> 0.4.33; direct major updates stay out of this batch.
